sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n64998" key="marauge/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μᾰραυγ-έω</orth>, <sense id="n64998.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">contract the pupil when exposed to light</tr_>, of cats' eyes, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.376f</biblScope></bibl>, cf. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">599f</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
